news_items.summary: The Rangers have placed outfielder Wyatt Langford on the 10-day injured list because of a strained left hamstring and activated outfielder Evan Carter off the IL.

news_items.headline: Mozeliak eyes short, long view as Halos interim GM...
news_items.summary: John Mozeliak has a lengthy to-do list as interim general manager for the Angels, but the hiring of a new manager to replace Kurt Suzuki is not among his priorities.

news_items.headline: Royals' Ragans to have elbow surgery Wednesday
news_items.summary: Royals left-hander Cole Ragans will undergo elbow surgery Wednesday that will determine the degree of repair needed, manager Matt Quatraro said.

news_items.headline: Bassitt has back surgery; O's hopeful for '26 retu...
news_items.summary: Orioles pitcher Chris Bassitt opted to have surgery on his back, and the team is hopeful he will be able to return before the end of the season.

news_items.headline: Guardians activate DeLauter after brief IL stay
news_items.summary: Guardians outfielder Chase DeLauter was activated off the injured list before Sunday's series finale against the Mariners.

news_items.headline: Tucker keeps 'grinding,' has 3 hits as Dodgers win...
news_items.summary: In a 15-3 thrashing of the Padres, Dodgers outfielder Kyle Tucker broke out with his fifth three-hit game this season, including a home run during a nine-run sixth inning.
